title: CobbleDigimon
description: Datapack that adds Digimon to Cobblemon mod (Mega Ultimate Extreme Work In Progress)
body:
**Passion Project** made by someone **without any skills** in creating models, animations, and textures. Full Relese (version 1.0) will include about 50 Digimon (the original 8, and a few more).

Most things will change and evolve as I get better, I'm extremely lazy so updates might take alot of time. I'm putting this addon out to motivate myself.

# Features as of today:
- 17 new creatures to catch
- Backwards Evolution using revives (Up to change)
- Absolutely horrendous animations! (Like really bad)
- And nothing more!

# Info:
- Cobblemon is required (duh)
- That's all folks for now.

# Future Plans:
- More Digimon!
- much better textures and animations

### License or something:
all creatures are from Digimon Series which is owned by Bandai and Toei Animations (That's what Wikipedia says) Play their games and watch Digimon it's peak.
